title: Museum of the African Diaspora (San Francisco) - Visitor Information & Reviews
content: # Museum of the African Diaspora. 5. Current: Museum of the African Diaspora. ## Museum of the African Diaspora and its collection. The Museum of the African Diaspora, also known as MoAD, is a contemporary art museum situated in the heart of San Francisco, California. The Museum of the African Diaspora is unique in its focus on artists and exhibitions exclusively from the African diaspora. Visitors can expect to immerse themselves in a rich tapestry of art and culture that celebrates the African diaspora and its global influence. #**14** Art & Design in San Francisco   #**12** Contemporary art museums in San Francisco   #**5** Ethnology museums in San Francisco   #**47** Art & Design in California   #**26** Contemporary art museums in California   #**20** Ethnology museums in California   #**141** Ethnology museums in United States. ### Images of Museum of the African Diaspora. Overall, the Museum of the African Diaspora is well-regarded for its focused, educational approach to African culture and art, offering a valuable, if compact, museum experience in San Francisco.

title: San Francisco Tour Reviews | A Taste of SF
content: > “We loved our morning tour of San Fran, Muir Woods and Sausalito. Michael was our guide and he was extremely informative about the city. Muir Woods was quite chilly in the morning but we had the perfect amount of time to walk quite a bit and visit the gift shop. It was nice and quiet in the woods. On the way back we stopped at a fort for a unique view of the bridge and had a few minutes to take pictures. > Muir Woods and Sausalito Afternoon Tour Small-Group Half-Day. My husband and I spent the weekend in San Francisco and wanted to explore outside of the city. We chose the Muir Woods & Sausalito + Half-Day Wine Country Tour, and it exceeded our expectations! The beautiful views near the Golden Gate Bridge, walking the trails among the gorgeous trees of Muir Woods, visiting the beautiful city of Sausalito, and the unique wine tasting experiences in Sonoma made for an unforgettable day.
